stemHtml:
A single-engined piston aeroplane is flying at an altitude of 4500 ft AMSL. Given the following information, if the engine fails at this altitude, what should be the expected net glide distance over ground with an elevation of 380 ft?

L/D: 12.7:1 
TAS: 100 kt 
Wind: Nil 
(Assume 1 NM = 6080 ft)
